---
title: "DMR_clones"
output: html_document
date: "2025-06-16"
params:
  methrix_qc_dir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/iPSC_EMseq/Methrix/h5_QC_SNP_filtered/
  isa_path: C:/Users/Casper.deVisser/Documents/ipsc-data-analysis/20240822_Xomics_iPSC_Neurons_new_READ-ONLY.xlsx
  outdir: Z:/data/iPSC_data/Results/DM1/
---


## Libaries
```{r}
library(DSS)
```

```{r}
print(params)
```

```{r}
outdir <- params$outdir

if (!dir.exists(outdir)){
  outdir <- getwd()
}
```

## Complete set of QC Methrix object
```{r}
meth_object <- methrix::load_HDF5_methrix(params$methrix_qc_dir)
```


## Subset DM1 P2 P3 and control samples
```{r}
all_samples <- meth_object@colData@rownames
DM1_CTRL_samples <- all_samples[!grepl('CHD2', all_samples) &  !grepl('NANS', all_samples)]

### !! Remove Repeat excised sample !! ###
DM1_CTRL_samples <- DM1_CTRL_samples[!grepl(pattern = 'rep', DM1_CTRL_samples)]
### !! Remove P1 samples !! ###
DM1_CTRL_samples <- DM1_CTRL_samples[!grepl(pattern = 'p1', DM1_CTRL_samples)]

subset_meth <- meth_object[, DM1_CTRL_samples ]
```


## bs object
```{r}
bs_obj <- methrix::methrix2bsseq(subset_meth)
bs_obj
```


## DM1 Design matrix (clones, CRISPR line with clone 1)
```{r}
DiseasControls <- ifelse(grepl('DM1', DM1_CTRL_samples), "Patient", "Control")

design <- data.frame(DiseaseControl = DiseasControls)
```

## DM patients vs controls
```{r}
bs_obj <- bs_obj[seqnames(bs_obj) == "chr19", ]
dmr_fit <- DMLfit.multiFactor(BSobj = bs_obj, design = design, formula = ~ DiseaseControl)
```

## DML 
```{r}
dml_test <- DMLtest.multiFactor(dmr_fit, coef = 2 )
```

## Differentially metylated regions (DMRs)
```{r}
dmrs_sign <- DSS::callDMR(dml_test, p.threshold = 0.001)
```

# DMPK region
```{r}
start <- 45764750
end <- 45784750

dmrs_sign_chr19 <- dmrs_sign[dmrs_sign$chr == 'chr19',]
dmrs_sign_chr19_DMPK_20kb <- dmrs_sign_chr19[dmrs_sign_chr19$start >= start & dmrs_sign_chr19$end <= end,] 
```

```{r}
write.csv(dmrs_sign, file.path(outdir, 'DMRS_DM1_PatientsControls.csv'))
```
